title: alchemilla splendens var. infravallesia
intro: Alchemilla splendens var. infravallesia, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a herbaceous perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae, characterized by its scalloped leaves and delicate white or yellowish flowers. The plant is rich in astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, particularly tannins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla splendens var. infravallesia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and menstrual issues. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla splendens var. infravallesia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to create topical treatments for skin irritations and other health concerns.
